overview: A full-stack ICP Casino with Internet Identity login, real ICP betting, slot machines (Lucky Sevens, Midnight Dragons), and a Versus Mode section for real-time PvP skill games (chess, dice, rock-paper-scissors) with ICP wagers of 10, 30, or 100 ICP. Strict gold and purple color scheme throughout.
features: ICP wallet integration with real bets
Game lobby with featured carousel and category filters
Lucky Sevens slot machine with 1/3/5 ICP bets
Versus Mode with live PvP matchmaking
Chess with full move validation and checkmate detection
Dice Roll and Rock-Paper-Scissors PvP games
Wager options of 10, 30, or 100 ICP for PvP
Live in-game chat during PvP matches
Online player lobby with wallet balances
